capabilities.label: Airport detail
capabilities.reason: Puerto Rico airport registry is loaded by the diagnostic backend.

capabilities.label: Airport operations
capabilities.reason: No owned, licensed, or public-official operational adapter is configured.

capabilities.label: Airport disruptions
capabilities.reason: No disruption adapter is configured.

capabilities.label: Airport weather
capabilities.reason: No official METAR/TAF adapter is configured.

capabilities.label: Bookmarks
capabilities.reason: Versioned diagnostic user-state repository is not implemented yet.

capabilities.label: Recent selections
capabilities.reason: Console user-state repository is not implemented yet.

capabilities.label: Map/list/airport/fleet view modes
capabilities.reason: Separate pages and aircraft card/table views exist, but no synchronized console.

capabilities.label: Viewport aircraft list
capabilities.reason: No normalized aircraft-state collection is connected.

capabilities.label: Configurable columns
capabilities.reason: Column registry is not implemented yet.

capabilities.label: Interactive map navigation
capabilities.reason: The React surface currently uses a diagnostic SVG shell.

capabilities.label: Geolocation
capabilities.reason: Browser geolocation control is not implemented yet.

capabilities.label: Playback date/time selection
capabilities.reason: Synthetic observations include exact timestamps; no operational history is connected.

capabilities.label: Playback timeline
capabilities.reason: No normalized time-indexed aircraft-state store is connected.

capabilities.label: Console widgets
capabilities.reason: Diagnostic dashboard panels exist but are not dockable console widgets.

capabilities.label: Basemap controls
capabilities.reason: Interactive map runtime and basemap registry are not implemented yet.

capabilities.label: Map brightness
capabilities.reason: Interactive map style controls are not implemented yet.

capabilities.label: Day/night overlay
capabilities.reason: Solar terminator layer is not implemented yet.

capabilities.label: ATC overlays
capabilities.reason: Authoritative display-ready ATC boundary layers are not connected.

capabilities.label: Oceanic tracks
capabilities.reason: No official or licensed oceanic-track adapter is configured.

capabilities.label: Airport badges
capabilities.reason: Airport markers exist, but operational status badges do not.

capabilities.label: Aircraft labels
capabilities.reason: Aircraft profile and live-state collections are not connected.

capabilities.label: Aircraft styling
capabilities.reason: Interactive aircraft symbol renderer is not implemented yet.

capabilities.label: Source visibility
capabilities.reason: Canonical source taxonomy is available; operational source collections are not connected.

capabilities.label: Unit preferences
capabilities.reason: Unit provider and preference repository are not implemented yet.
